name: Creeping Caterpillar Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup unsalted butter or margarine, softened to room temperature
3 cups prepared white frosting (tinted with green, yellow, purple, or orange food coloring)
Tinted coconut (green, yellow, purple, or orange)
Variety of round candies for eyes or spots
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Line a 24-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the cake flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a stand-alone mixer or using a handheld electric mixer, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add the eggs, one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Add the vanilla and beat to combine.
6. If making chocolate cake, add the cooled, melted chocolate and mix well, then add milk.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture into the butter mixture and mix until just combined.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared tins and bake for 20 minutes.
9. Cool completely.
10. Frost the cupcakes with the tinted frosting and sprinkle with tinted coconut for a fuzzy caterpillar.
11. Arrange them in a curving pattern on top of a large cutting board or piece of cardboard covered with foil.
12. Snip licorice into short lengths to form antennae and legs.
13. Place round candies for eyes and mouth.
14. If desired, place round candies on cupcakes for spotted caterpillars.
Yield: 24 cupcakes
